score.notes: fit 7: MS-stack BI dev (SQL Server, Azure SQL, SSIS, ADF, Power BI, ETL, data modeling) maps to Power BI/ETL/modeling in self-serve-dashboards, reporting-turnaround, and data-quality-program, though it leans DBA/SSIS/SAP-HANA where the corpus is thinner. comp 6: £50-60k (~$63-76k) clears the $60k floor, below the $78k target. visa 3 (low conf): Macclesfield UK, hybrid/onsite — needs relocation+sponsorship per profile; posting is silent on sponsorship, scored conservatively. remote 2: hybrid onsite, conflicts with remote-first. growth 6: senior IC at a multinational. Weighted: 7*3+6*2+3*2+2*1.5+6*1.5 = 21+12+6+3+9 = 51 → backup (<60).

next_action.action: Park (backup tier) — onsite UK needs sponsorship; revisit only if pipeline thins
